prompt: Hero frame, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, photorealistic close-up of a human hand holding a white smartphone in portrait orientation against a soft royal blue #5469B9 gradient backdrop. On the phone screen: an 8x8 dark navy #1E2744 puzzle grid filled with glossy beveled polyomino blocks in saturated brand colors, a glowing gold #FFD700 L-shaped block hovering mid-drag above a nearly-complete row, gold sparks anticipating a line clear. Clean, vibrant abstract aesthetic featuring glossy, beveled blocks on a high-contrast dark grid. Bold white sans-serif on-screen text overlay reads 'Can you clear it?' at the top. Cinematic macro lens, soft key light, tactile and satisfying mood.
